info.title: MICROSERVICE_DEV_Transaction Management API
info.description: The Transaction Processing API facilitates the management of financial transactions, allowing organizations to process payments, refunds, and adjustments efficiently. This API serves as a bridge for integrating transaction functionalities into various business applications, catering to developers in fintech, e-commerce, and accounting sectors. By leveraging this API, users can streamline their transaction workflows, ensuring accuracy and speed in financial operations.

post.description: This endpoint allows users to create a new transaction by providing the necessary transaction details. Ensure all required fields are filled to successfully create a transaction.

requestBody.description: This request body is used to initiate a new transaction. It expects a JSON object containing all necessary details about the transaction, including but not limited to the transaction amount, payment method, and related identifiers.

500.description: An unexpected server error occurred while processing the request.

200.description: The request was successful and the response contains the transaction details.

404.description: The requested resource could not be found.

timestamp.description: The timestamp at which the error occurred.

status.description: Indicates if the operation was successful or not.

message.description: A descriptive error message providing more details.
message.example: Unable to process financial transaction due to internal service failure.

path.description: The path of the API endpoint that was accessed.

trace.description: A detailed trace of the error, useful for debugging.

details.description: Detailed information about the error that occurred.

suggestion.description: A suggestion for resolving the error.
suggestion.example: Please retry after some time or contact support if the issue persists.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Creat.description: This schema represents a response structure for HTTP 500 errors in the transactions operations.

example.message: Unable to process financial transaction due to internal service failure.

details.message: Payment gateway timeout while processing transaction request.

example.suggestion: Please retry after some time or contact support if the issue persists.

service.description: The name of the service where the error occurred.

errorCode.description: A specific error code associated with the error.

message.description: A descriptive message regarding the specific error.

gateway.description: The associated gateway that reported the error.

retryable.description: Indicates whether the operation can be retried.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Error.description: Contains additional details about the error that occurred.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Creat.title: Transaction Response

customerId.description: Unique identifier for the customer associated with the transaction.

accountNumber.description: The account number from which the transaction was made.

amount.description: The amount involved in the transaction.

currency.description: The currency in which the transaction amount is specified (e.g., 'USD', 'EUR').

processedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the transaction was processed.

paymentMode.description: Mode of payment used for the transaction (e.g., 'credit card', 'bank transfer').

message.description: Additional message or information related to the transaction.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Creat.description: Schema representing the response after a successful transaction operation. It provides details about the transaction that has been processed.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Creat.title: Transaction Request Body

customerId.description: Unique identifier of the customer making the transaction.

accountNumber.description: The account number from which the transaction will be made.

amount.description: The amount of money to be transacted.

currency.description: The currency in which the transaction is made (e.g., 'USD', 'EUR').

beneficiaryAccount.description: The account number of the beneficiary receiving the transaction.

transactionDate.description: The date on which the transaction is initiated, in ISO 8601 format.

paymentMode.description: Mode of payment for the transaction (e.g., 'online', 'offline').

remarks.description: Additional remarks or notes regarding the transaction.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Creat.description: Schema representing the body of a transaction request.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Creat.title: Transaction Error Response

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the error occurred.

status.description: Indicates whether the transaction operation was successful or not.

error.description: A short description of the error encountered during the transaction.

message.description: A detailed message explaining the reason for the error.
message.example: Source account details not found for transaction processing.

path.description: The path in the API where the error occurred.

trace.description: A trace identifier for identifying the error in logs.

suggestion.description: An optional suggestion to help the user rectify the error.
suggestion.example: Verify account details and retry the transaction.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Creat.description: Schema representing the structure of a 404 error response related to transaction operations.

example.message: Source account details not found for transaction processing.

details.message: No active account exists for the provided account number.

example.suggestion: Verify account details and retry the transaction.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Trans.title: Transaction Error Details

accountNumber.description: The account number associated with the transaction.

accountType.description: The type of account associated with the transaction.

errorCode.description: A specific code representing the error.

message.description: A message explaining the nature of the error.
message.example: No transaction exists with the provided ID.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Trans.description: Schema representing detailed information related to a transaction error.

environment.name: environment
environment.description: Environment used to select the workflow branch.

serviceCategory.name: serviceCategory
serviceCategory.description: Service category used to select the workflow branch.
